data.description:
# Minor-bug bundle: NO_SYNC inversion, verify_completion graph=False, test-fake signature

## What
Three small verified bugs:
1. `config.py:876-877` `REBAR_NO_SYNC` inverts the truthy convention (`false`/`no`/`off` disable sync). Align with `_as_bool`.
2. MCP/CLI `verify_completion` collapses `graph=False`->None (`mcp_server.py:703`, `_cli/_llm_commands.py:275`), so own-criteria verification of an epic is inexpressible. Thread a real tri-state.
3. Workflow test fake for `verify_signature` (`tests/unit/workflow/test_completion_verification_workflow.py:98-100`) lacks `kind=`, so every call raises TypeError swallowed into `uncertified` — the certified-child branch is untestable. Fix the fake signature.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `REBAR_NO_SYNC` parses via the shared truthy convention; regression test pins it.
- [ ] `graph=False` reaches `verify_completion` unchanged over MCP + CLI; test covers it.
- [ ] The test fake matches `verify_signature(cid, kind=…, repo_root=…)`; the certified-child branch is exercised.
- [ ] Commit carries a `rebar-ticket:` trailer.
data.title: Minor-bug bundle: NO_SYNC inversion, verify_completion graph=False, test-fake signature
